sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive stock trades near yearly high as earnings and dividend support valuation
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive stock is trading near its 52-week high, supported by consistent sales growth, strong operating margins, and a reliable dividend. The company's defensive profile is underscored by robust earnings and cash flow, which enable it to cover capital expenditures, dividends, and share repurchases. Its flagship Colgate toothpaste and the growing Hill's Pet Nutrition business contribute to its competitive positioning and make it an attractive investment for income-oriented portfolios.

feed.title: HF Foods acquires Searay Foods for USD 34 million in first international expansion
feed.summary: HF Foods, a U.S.-based distributor of international foodservice solutions, is set to acquire Searay Foods, a Canadian importer and distributor of ethnic and specialty frozen seafood, for USD 34 million. This acquisition marks HF Foods' first international expansion, aiming to leverage Searay's established reputation in frozen seafood and its U.S. operations to enhance cross-selling and supply chain synergies. The transaction is expected to close in Q3 2026, with Searay's current management continuing to lead as a subsidiary.

feed.title: Salesforce wins contract with VA worth up to $1.6B to modernize care (CRM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) has secured a contract with the U.S. Dept. of Veterans Affairs, valued at up to $1.6 billion, to modernize care for veterans. The agreement includes providing AI-powered virtual support, automated benefits verification, and AI agents within existing VA workflows. Integrations with MuleSoft, Data 360, and Tableau are also planned to unify data and enhance personalized care.

feed.title: Sempra stock holds firm as gas infrastructure earnings and dividend support valuation
feed.summary: Sempra stock is supported by its regulated North American energy infrastructure, including gas and electric utilities and LNG operations. Sempra has significant capital expenditure plans for grid modernization and LNG facilities, aiming for continued rate base and dividend growth.

feed.title: Campbell's swaps red labels for green on new soups
feed.summary: Campbell's is introducing a new line of five protein-rich soups with green-and-white labels, a significant change from their traditional red-and-white design used for over 125 years. This shift aims to capitalize on the growing consumer demand for high-protein foods, with the new soups featuring slow-simmered bone broth and other protein sources. The soups are currently available on Amazon.com and are rolling out to retailers nationwide.

feed.title: Is ConocoPhillips’ (COP) Pre‑Earnings Outperformance Challenging the Cautious Zacks Rank #4 Narrative?
